subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Boris Dorin
body:
Hi Boris Dorin,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at First Imagine! Ventures. Would love to swap notes on Deep Tech, AI, Energy, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed/Series A.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
interests: Deep Tech, AI, Energy, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed/Series A
